name: dossier
description: Marketplace for the dossier plugin: an opinionated job-search workflow for Claude Code — a verified candidate knowledge base, tailored ATS-safe applications gated by claim-to-source traceability, and European/DACH conventions built in.

plugins.name: dossier
plugins.description: Opinionated job-search workflow: an extensive resumable interview builds a verified candidate knowledge base, then per posting sub-agents tailor an ATS-safe CV and a company-specific cover letter, gated by a verifier that traces every claim to the knowledge base. European/DACH conventions built in.
